title: CVE-1999-1311 — CVSS 4.6 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-1999-1311

CVSS Score: 4.6 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 1997-01-07T05:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

Vulnerability in dtlogin and dtsession in HP-UX 10.20 and 10.10 allows local users to bypass authentication and gain privileges.

References: http://ciac.llnl.gov/ciac/bulletins/h-21.shtml, http://ciac.llnl.gov/ciac/bulletins/h-21.shtml, http://ciac.llnl.gov/ciac/bulletins/h-21.shtml
